title: They Don't Cut the Grass Anymore
original_title: They Don't Cut the Grass Anymore
overview: Two Texas gardeners, who object to Northern attitudes and lifestyles, venture northward to cut lawns, trim hedges, and murder and mutilate Northern Yuppies.
